scripts.dev:all: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" -n "api,customer,kitchen,admin" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:kitchen" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p services/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/customer-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/kitchen-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p apps/admin-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/customer-web run build && npm --workspace apps/kitchen-web run build && npm --workspace apps/admin-web run build
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
